checkin.journal:
Feeling okey but a little bit off today. cosita also not feeling well but she has a reason me, i was a bit off already in the morning - this alarm in the middle of the night didnt help my sleep was properly interrupted, overall still a solid day, discovered love for sauna and I think depending on my sleep might do it again.
5/10 bloating, i think ice cream and bagels … need to stop both of them and see whats up
